violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Empty sanitizer jug was replaced. Sanitizer log is to be maintained daily. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Bagged ice was obtained during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on a table in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The floor in the back area is in poor repair with paint peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2026
The hand-washing sink at the bar was nonfunctional during inspection. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

Plastic containers are being used as scoops in containers of flour. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

Pizza paddles observed stored on an unclean surface (the brackets of a wire shelf) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

Knives and pizza cutters observed stored on an unclean surface (crack between knife rack and wall) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
Utensils on the Keurig table are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
Ice buckets are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: can opener base table beneath flattop grill wire rack next to oven prep units sauce bottles. The chest freezer has an accumulation of frost and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The handwashing sink at the bar is in poor repair, nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025
The handwashing sink in the kitchen is in poor repair, with the cold water faucet handle missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (cooked chicken) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Chicken was re-cooked in the fryer. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

The hand-washing sink at the bar was nonfunctional. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Owner repaired it during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

Open containers of food in the prep unit were observed stacked with the container on top directly in contact with the food beneath. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service, and bagged ice will be used until the ice machine has been cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-200ppm. Sanitizer was manually adjusted, and Ecolab was called during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

Tuna salad observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
Ham observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the small counter refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
Drain plugs are lacking for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit, and the table beneath the grill have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The 3 bay sink was in poor repair, with water dripping from the sanitizer bay.The hand wash sink in the kitchen was in poor repair, with the hot water handle not working.The hand sink at the bar was nonfunctional. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair.All 3 sinks were repaired during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets for 2 door prep unit, 1 door freezer, and walk-in coolers were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Handwashing sink in kitchen was observed leaking into a container. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The condensate lines from the soda gun and tap drip tray is draining into the 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Once food safety certificate is obtained, establishment must register with the state. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Partition is required between food prep sink and ware washing table. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
Gaskets for the 2 door prep unit and 1 door freezer in back storage room were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium and chlorine sanitizing solutions for the 3 bay sink and dishwashing machines. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. 1 door freezer (ice accumulation) 2. walk-in cooler gaskets 3. shelving in beverage cooler New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The food prep sink is lacking a proper air gap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The condensate from the soda gun line and drip tray from tap are draining into 3 bay sink at the bar. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The walls in the storage room near food prep table is constructed of painted sheet rock. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and fan guards of the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023
Food prep sink was lacking proper air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
The wall in the backroom area near the ice machine is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
